meta.topic: paid_extension cell targets for the U(a0+1) ledger, four deployed v13 raw rows
meta.status: CONDITIONAL / AUDIT-derived (exact integer margins; open-part target is a named-input specification, not a proof)
meta.cell_definition: paid_extension(a) upper-bounds the MCA/CA-bad slopes gamma in F of a fixed received F-valued line that are genuinely extension-line (minimal field B(gamma)=F), after the base/tower slope-strata are routed to lower-arity base cells.
meta.extends_packet_family: experimental/data/certificates/frontier-adjacent/ -- introduced by PR #329 (frontier-adjacent-v13-rows, an OPEN sibling PR at the time this branch was cut). This file is new (the directory does not exist on this branch's base commit) and uses a filename distinct from all four of #329's packet JSONs, so the two branches merge with no path collisions -- see the companion note's Merge hygiene section.
meta.does_not_pay_the_cell: This artifact and its companion note record TARGETS and a per-branch PAID/OPEN ledger for paid_extension. They do not certify U(a0+1) <= B_star and do not close the K=F (full-orbit) cell; that cell remains OPEN / CONDITIONAL_ON_NAMED_INPUT.

KB.lattice_shape: diamond (2 and 3 incomparable): F_p < F_p2 < F_p6 and F_p < F_p3 < F_p6, F_p2 cap F_p3 = F_p, F_p2.F_p3 = F_p6

one_pos_dim_chart_cost.verdict_vs_B_star: fits absolute budget (2^30.99 < 2^57.93) but busts every fail-margin

rows.binding_constraint: ABSOLUTE budget (q_gen=p'=2^31 > B*=2^24; e_Y>=1 impossible even before margins) AND tightest fail-margin
ABSOLUTE budget AND tightest fail-margin (binding row for the whole extension cell)

branch_ledger.note: EF Galois-stabilizer trichotomy for the bad-slope minimal field K=B(gamma), applied to a fixed genuinely-F-valued received line.

B_lt_K_lt_F_tower_confined.charged_to: arity-[F:K] intermediate base cells (strictly lower arity than e)

K_eq_F_full_orbit.named_input_needed: a certified descended-cycle classification inventory (base/tower/noncontainment-degenerate) OR a direct full-orbit pole-forcing theorem OR an exact zero-dimensional Weil-restricted eliminant (thm:extension-line-dimension-degree-ledger)
K_eq_F_full_orbit.target: e_Y = 0 and Delta_ext <= 2^{fail_margin}; the genuinely-F-valued MCA-bad-slope locus is a finite union of size-e Frobenius orbits of bounded total degree

falsifiable_prediction.P: For each deployed row and its toy tower analogue, the genuinely-F-valued (K=F) MCA-bad slopes of any band-regime received line form a FINITE set: a union of complete Frobenius orbits of size e (6 KB / 4 M31) whose total size is a field-size-independent constant Delta_ext, NOT growing with q_gen.
falsifiable_prediction.falsifier: a band-regime F-valued pair over a toy tower whose K=F bad-slope count grows with the base prime p0 (e.g. proportional to p0), i.e. a positive-dimensional (e_Y>=1) extension chart -> paid_extension unpayable at deployed margins -> COUNTEREXAMPLE_NEW_FLOOR refuting the adjacent-pair frontier on the extension side.

toy_search.procedure: enumerate/sample F_{p0^e}-valued pairs (f,g); brute-force all support-wise MCA-bad slopes gamma in F_{p0^e}; classify each by deg(F_{p0}(gamma)/F_{p0}); tabulate #{K=F} vs p0; fit growth (constant=target holds, linear=falsifier).
toy_search.matches: agents.md F1 toy menu (extensions of small fields, rho=1/2, t=1,2); f1_extension_coordinate_transfer 'Next Step' (classify multiplication-slice supports of {M_z} in Mat_e(B)).

audit_corrections.method: exact integer recompute: floor((p_KB^(w+1) * B_star_KB) / comb(2**21, a0+1)) using cached math.comb via a ratio-walk from one base call, no floats
audit_corrections.root_cause: the source draft's compute_ext.py printed the ceiling with Python's ':,.0f' format, which ROUNDS to nearest; the true design semantics (Delta_ext <= 2^fail_margin, Delta_ext an integer) require FLOOR. 2^22.19686... = 4807520.9378, which rounds to 4807521 but floors to 4807520.

audit_corrections.method: same exact integer recompute as above, KB-list row
audit_corrections.root_cause: same round-vs-floor artifact: 2^22.010942... = 4226236.5385, rounds to 4226237 but floors to 4226236.

audit_corrections_note: The two M31 rows' Delta_ext_ceiling_int values (9, 8) were independently re-derived exactly and were already the correct floors (2^3.2589=9.572 -> floor 9; 2^3.0730=8.415 -> floor 8) -- the draft's stored M31 integers needed no correction. Note that round-to-nearest would nonetheless misprint M31-MCA (9.572 -> 10) as well as both KB rows (.938/.539 -> +1); only M31-list (8.415) has floor==round. See verify_frontier_extension_cell_targets.py gate G7 for the exact-integer re-derivation (no floating point in the corrected values; float log2 only in informational display fields, cross-checked at loose tolerance).
